item.title: UK Ban on Palestine Action Is Unlawful, Court Finds
item.description: The High Court said the ban on Palestine Action as a terrorist group breached free speech rights and was disproportionate. The government said it woul...

item.title: Live Updates: Munich Security Conference Begins Amid Trans-Atlantic Turmoil
item.description: Some are hoping for a reprieve of President Trump’s blunt-force diplomacy. Others fear new disdain and recriminations.

item.title: Why India Playing Pakistan in World Cup Cricket Matters
